steps.title: Set up the linear form
steps.content: Since the slope is 2, the linear function has the form $g(x) = 2x + b$ where $b$ is the y-intercept to find.

steps.title: Find b using the given point
steps.content:
Substitute the point $(1, 14)$ into the equation:

$$14 = 2(1) + b$$
$$14 = 2 + b$$
$$b = 12$$

Therefore $g(x) = 2x + 12$. That matches choice C — C is correct.
